workloads.name: p0 render pixel-local-storage barrier macro (500)
workloads.description: Directional macro PLS workload with 500 in-command iterations to stress non-coherent barrier sequencing overhead.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples macro PLS contract with explicit feature-gating parity: pixel_local_storage repeated 500x and normalized per iteration. Command contract explicitly sets async_diagnostics featurePolicy=emulate-when-unavailable for deterministic execution on feature-limited adapters.

timingNormalization.note: Apples-to-apples macro PLS contract: command-repeat=500 with per-iteration barrier-sequencing normalization and explicit feature-gating parity support.

workloads.name: zero-initialize workgroup memory (256)
workloads.description: Compute workload aligned to Dawn VulkanZeroInitializeWorkgroupMemoryExtensionTest workgroupSize=256 variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: workgroup-size and iteration structure aligned to Dawn VulkanZeroInitializeWorkgroupMemoryExtensionTest.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn executes 50 dispatch iterations per step; Fawn repeats dispatch 50 times and normalizes to per-iteration units.
